privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for gpredict_env urban_sidewalk_astronomy_setup task. Verified that the expected target location parameters (Chicago at 41.8781 N, 87.6298 W, 181m alt), module name (Urban_Bright), prediction constraints (40 deg min elevation, -12 deg max sun, 20 passes), and target satellites (ISS 25544, CSS 48274) exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt description and the expected TLE formats in stations.txt. Additionally, I discovered that the task is defective because 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, rendering the task technically unscorable by the benchmark system.
